channel.title: CI/CD on Jeyaprakash's Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in CI/CD on Jeyaprakash's Portfolio

item.title: Building a CI/CD-Enabled Discord Bot on Raspberry Pi 5
item.description: How I built and deployed a fully automated Discord bot on Raspberry Pi 5 with a CI/CD-driven deployment pipeline — always up-to-date with zero manual intervention.
